# Program Postfix ke Infix

postfix = input("Masukkan ekspresi postfix: ")

stack = []

for i in postfix:
    if i.isalnum():          # jika operand
        stack.append(i)
    else:                    # jika operator
        op2 = stack.pop()
        op1 = stack.pop()
        ekspresi = "(" + op1 + i + op2 + ")"
        stack.append(ekspresi)

hasil = stack.pop()

print("Hasil Infix:", hasil)

# Program Prefix ke Infix

prefix = input("Masukkan ekspresi prefix: ")

stack = []

# Membaca dari kanan ke kiri
for i in reversed(prefix):
    if i.isalnum():           # jika operand
        stack.append(i)
    else:                     # jika operator
        op1 = stack.pop()
        # op2 = stack.pop()
        ekspresi = "(" + op1 + i + ")"
        stack.append(ekspresi)

hasil = stack.pop()

print("Hasil Infix:", hasil)

# Program Prefix ke Postfix

prefix = input("Masukkan ekspresi prefix: ")

stack = []

# membaca dari kanan ke kiri
for i in reversed(prefix):
    if i.isalnum():      # jika operand
        stack.append(i)
    else:                # jika operator
        op1 = stack.pop()
        op2 = stack.pop()
        ekspresi = op1 + op2 + i
        stack.append(ekspresi)

hasil = stack.pop()

print("Hasil Postfix:", hasil)

# Program Postfix ke Prefix

postfix = input("Masukkan ekspresi postfix: ")

stack = []

for i in postfix:
    if i.isalnum():      # jika operand
        stack.append(i)
    else:                # jika operator
        op2 = stack.pop()
        op1 = stack.pop()
        ekspresi = i + op1 + op2
        stack.append(ekspresi)

hasil = stack.pop()

print("Hasil Prefix:", hasil)
